##NAMES=Taramellite
##RRUFFID=R160011
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ba_4_(Fe^3+^,Ti)_4_O_2_[B_2_Si_8_O_27_]Cl_x_
##LOCALITY=Gun claim, Yukon Territory, Canada
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Gunnar Färber
##DESCRIPTION=Red-brownish crystals in cavity, associated with  itsiite, cerchiaraite-(Fe), diopside, pyrite, quartz, sphalerite, and witherite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R160011
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 12.2039 b: 13.9582 c: 7.1323 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 1214.95 crystal system: orthorhombic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
